name: Navigator Global Investments Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.4700, stop A$2.2869, target A$2.7900 (1.75:1) — then trail it.
